did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper proposes an unsupervised, traditional active contour model (ACM) driven by signed pressure force for image segmentation. While it evaluates the method on dermatology datasets (PH2 and skin-cancer-mnist-ham10000) and compares its performance against deep learning methods (like DeepLabV3+), the study's own results are obtained using the proposed non-AI computational modeling technique, not AI/ML/DL.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
